subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending word and utterance, befitteth Him Who is the Goal of all worlds, Who hath been made the target of opposition and denial [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان مقصود عالمیان را لایق و سزاست که اعراض و اعتراض
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @predictions and prophecies, @growth of the Cause
